caption: A man with dark skin, wearing glasses, a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bow tie, and a tall, gray, textured wig, is seated in a recording studio. He wears large black over-ear headphones and sits behind a professional black microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a clothing rack with garments, including a yellow shirt labeled "LEE." Two logos are visible on the screen: one featuring a microphone and the text "TALK RADIO PODCAST" and another with a microphone and the text "GOSS TALK JOY." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, slightly shifting his posture and changing his facial expression from a neutral look to one of speaking, with his mouth opening and closing slightly as he interacts with someone off-screen.
